name: Salmon Patties with Lemon Cheese Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the salmon and reserve 1/2 cup of liquid.
2. Set aside the reserved liquid.
3. Remove bones and skin from the salmon; flake into small pieces.
4. Melt butter in a saucepan over low heat.
5. Add flour to the melted butter, stirring constantly until smooth.
6. Gradually add the reserved liquid and milk, stirring continuously.
7. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until thickened and bubbly.
8. Remove from heat and stir in onion, parsley, mustard, lemon juice, salt,
pepper, beau monde seasoning, and hot pepper sauce.
9. Stir in flaked salmon and beaten egg until well combined.
10. Gradually add seasoned bread crumbs to the mixture, mixing gently.
11. Shape into 6 patties.
12. Heat oil in a skillet to a depth of 1/4 inch.
13. Fry patties in hot oil over medium heat for 5 minutes or until browned.
14. Drain excess oil and serve with Lemon Cheese Sauce.
